assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response clearly states PDBs are the most common cause and recommends starting with PDB check, noting it's the cause in 80% of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl get pdb -A -o wide' command which is equivalent to checking PDBs across all namespaces

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Includes multiple commands: checking cordoned nodes, pods on cordoned nodes, and eviction events to identify blocking pods

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Provides commands to check pending pods, failed scheduling events, and node resource usage with kubectl top nodes

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Shows kubectl patch command to adjust PDB settings temporarily, including backing up and restoring configuration

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's PDB timeout behavior or automatic force-drain after 1 hour

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Provides gcloud commands to adjust max-surge-upgrade and max-unavailable-upgrade settings as both fix and prevention

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Includes section on admission webhooks rejecting pods with commands to check validating and mutating webhook configurations

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Provides 'Monitor Progress After Fix' section with watch commands to track node upgrades and operation status

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE disruption-event notifications (POD_PDB_VIOLATION) that alert when eviction is blocked by PDB, available via Cloud Logging or Pub/Sub
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's disruption-event notifications, POD_PDB_VIOLATION events, or Cloud Logging/Pub/Sub integration
